source_jobs.title: GTM Partnerships Director
source_jobs.description:
ABOUT VERISOUL

Verisoul stops fake accounts and fraud in the era of AI. We distinguish real humans from bots and bad actors for high-growth companies like Clay, Augment Code, and Morning Consult.




OUR TRAJECTORY (LAST 12 MONTHS):

 - 6x YoY Growth: 6x ARR growth (to $2M) and scaled to 100+ customers.

 - Product Dominance: 80% competitive win rate; we catch 70-105% more fraud than legacy tools.

 - Strong Backing: Raised $8.8M Series A






YOU AND YOUR ROLE



You own the distribution strategy. Your goal is to embed Verisoul into the platforms our customers already use. You turn other companies into our best sales channels.

You identify the partners, negotiate the deal, manage the launch, and drive adoption.




WHAT YOU’LL DO:

 - Build Distribution Channels: Identify and close verticalized partners (e.g., Auth platforms, Fintech infrastructure) that allow clients to turn on Verisoul with one click.

 - Drive Adoption: A partnership isn't done until customers use it. You own the launch, the content, and the marketing to get users active.

 - Network Aggressively: Attend conferences and industry events. Build relationships with potential vendors and platform leaders.

 - Collaborate with GTM Directors: Work with vertical owners to identify which integrations will unlock their specific markets.

 - Quarterback Engineering: Bridge the gap between external partners and internal engineering. Ensure the integration gets built, deployed, and distributed.


WHAT YOU’LL BRING:

 - Experience: 3–5 years in Partnerships, Enterprise Sales, Business Development, or Channel Sales in B2B SaaS.

 - Technical Fluency: You understand APIs and integration architectures well enough to sell the vision to product teams at other companies.

 - Deal Execution: Proven track record of sourcing, negotiating, and signing partnership agreements.

 - Marketing Instinct: You know how to create the hype (blogs, announcements, webinars) needed to make a partnership successful.

 - Location: In-person in Austin, TX.




WHO YOU’LL WORK WITH:

 - Report to Chief Strategy Officer

 - GTM Directors: To figure out which partners matter most.

 - Engineering: To get the integrations built.

 - Founders: To align on ecosystem strategy.




COMPENSATION: $200,000 - $300,000 + EQUITY GRANT

 - Base Salary: $140,000 - $180,000

 - Bonus: Target $60,000 - $100,000

 - Equity: 0.25% - 0.5%

 - Benefits: 401k match (4%)




LIFE AT VERISOUL



In office 5 days a week in Austin, Texas!




BENEFITS

 - Free Lunch - personalized your way

 - $10K Relocation Bonus

 - 100% Insurance Coverage

 - 4% 401K Match

 - Unlimited Vacation

 - Up to 20 days Remote Annually

 - Beautiful Office




OUR VALUES

 1. All-in Optimism: Building a startup is hard. We bring the energy and steadfast optimism needed to push through challenges and accomplish the impossible—while having fun.

 2. Total Ownership: Be a self-starter and a self-completer. Own high-impact problems end-to-end, combining structure with the execution skills to get the job done.

 3. First Principles Curiosity: Challenge assumptions with a beginner’s mind. Rethink the "current way," test new hypotheses, and focus on finding the truth—even if it means changing your mind.

source_jobs.title: GTM Director
source_jobs.description:
ABOUT VERISOUL

Verisoul stops fake accounts and fraud in the era of AI. We distinguish real humans from bots and bad actors for high-growth companies like Clay, Augment Code, and Morning Consult.




OUR TRAJECTORY (LAST 12 MONTHS):

 - 6x YoY Growth: 6x ARR growth (to $2M) and scaled to 100+ customers.

 - Product Dominance: 80% competitive win rate; we catch 70-105% more fraud than legacy tools.

 - Strong Backing: Raised $8.8M Series A







YOU AND YOUR ROLE

You are the General Manager for a specific vertical. You own the revenue number and the strategy to achieve it. You define the target audience, generate the pipeline, and close the deals.




WHAT YOU’LL DO:

 - Develop Vertical Strategy: Map the ecosystem, competitive landscape, and customer problems for your specific vertical.

 - Generate Pipeline: Execute creative campaigns to start conversations. Use events, content, and direct outreach to build opportunities.

 - Close Deals: Manage the entire deal process. Take leads from first meeting to pilot to signed contract.

 - Direct Marketing Resources: Guide the Content and Events teams on exactly what you need to penetrate your market.

 - Build Relationships: Represent Verisoul at industry conferences, dinners, and events.

 - Customer Feedback: Translate customer conversations into strategic insights for Product and Engineering.




WHAT YOU’LL BRING:

 - Experience: 3–5 years in top-tier management consulting (McKinsey, Bain, BCG), strategy, GTM operations, or high-stakes startup GM roles.

 - Strategic Rigor: Ability to dissect a market, identify the winning value proposition, and execute a plan to capture it.

 - Execution Focus: Willingness to do the work—sending emails, taking calls, and negotiating contracts.

 - Analytical Thinking: Comfort with data, pricing models, and competitive analysis.

 - Location: In-person in Austin, TX.




WHO YOU’LL WORK WITH:

 - Report to the Chief Strategy Officer

 - Marketing & Events: You define the strategy; they help execute the tactics.

 - CX Engineers: They handle the technical implementation so you can focus on the commercial deal.

 - Founders: Work closely with the CEO




COMPENSATION: $200,000 - $300,000 + EQUITY GRANT

 - Base Salary: $140,000 - $180,000

 - Bonus: Target $60,000 - $100,000

 - Equity: 0.25% - 0.5%

source_jobs.title: Customer Solutions Manager
source_jobs.description:
ABOUT VERISOUL

Verisoul stops fake accounts and fraud in the era of AI. We distinguish real humans from bots and bad actors for high-growth companies like Clay, Augment Code, and Morning Consult.




OUR TRAJECTORY (LAST 12 MONTHS):

 - 6x YoY Growth: 6x ARR growth (to $2M) and scaled to 100+ customers.

 - Product Dominance: 80% competitive win rate; we catch 70-105% more fraud than legacy tools.

 - Strong Backing: Raised $8.8M Series A






YOU AND YOUR ROLE



You own the technical success of Verisoul’s customers. You are the bridge between the product and the customer, responsible for pilots, integrations, support, and ongoing account success.

You operate with extreme ownership and are accountable for making customers successful, end to end.




WHAT YOU'LL DO:

 1. Run Pilot Integrations
    Own customer pilots from start to finish: write code snippets, configure dashboards, and ensure integrations are implemented correctly.

 2. Prove Value with Data
    Analyze pilot and production data to demonstrate Verisoul’s impact.

 3. Own Technical Customer Support
    Serve as the first line of technical support, responding quickly to customer questions and resolving integration or product issues.

 4. Manage Customer Accounts
    Own customer relationships post integration.

 5. Drive Product Improvements
    Identify customer challenges and translate them into product improvements.

 6. Build and Deploy AI Automation
    Automate customer support, analytics, and operational workflows using AI agents.
    
    


WHAT YOU’LL BRING

 - 4+ years of experience across solutions engineering, sales engineering, product, technical customer success, support, or account management.

 - Code literacy with the ability to read and write code in Python or JavaScript and debug customer integrations.

 - Ownership mindset. You identify problems and then solve them.

 - Strong communication skills, with the ability to explain complex technical concepts clearly.

 - Data fluency, including comfort using SQL or Excel.

 - Location requirement, this role is in person in Austin, TX.




Who You’ll Work With:

 - Report to the Head of Customer Solutions

 - Sales: You provide the technical proof to help close deals.

 - Engineering: You provide the feedback they need to build the right features.

Compensation: $160,000 - 220,000 + Equity

 - Base Salary: $120,000 - $150,000

 - Bonus: $25,000 - 50,000 tied to customer retention targets

 - Equity: 0.05% - 0.15% with 4-year vesting

 - Benefits: 401k match (4%)




LIFE AT VERISOUL



In office 5 days a week in Austin, Texas!




BENEFITS

 - Free Lunch - personalized your way

 - $10K Relocation Bonus

 - 100% Insurance Coverage

 - 4% 401K Match

 - Unlimited Vacation

 - Up to 20 days Remote Annually

 - Beautiful Office




OUR VALUES

 1. All-in Optimism: Building a startup is hard. We bring the energy and steadfast optimism needed to push through challenges and accomplish the impossible—while having fun.

 2. Total Ownership: Be a self-starter and a self-completer. Own high-impact problems end-to-end, combining structure with the execution skills to get the job done.

 3. First Principles Curiosity: Challenge assumptions with a beginner’s mind. Rethink the "current way," test new hypotheses, and focus on finding the truth—even if it means changing your mind.

source_jobs.title: Head of Customer Solutions
source_jobs.description:
ABOUT VERISOUL

Verisoul stops fake accounts and fraud in the era of AI. We distinguish real humans from bots and bad actors for high-growth companies like Clay, Augment Code, and Morning Consult.




OUR TRAJECTORY (LAST 12 MONTHS):

 - 6x YoY Growth: 6x ARR growth (to $2M) and scaled to 100+ customers.

 - Product Dominance: 80% competitive win rate; we catch 70-105% more fraud than legacy tools.

 - Strong Backing: Raised $8.8M Series A






YOU AND YOUR ROLE



Our linkage to our customers is our strongest competitive advantage. As the Head of Customer Solutions, you will own how customers evaluate, integrate, adopt, and expand Verisoul. You will build and lead a function that spans pilots, integrations, post-sales execution, and ongoing customer outcomes - acting as the connective tissue between Sales, Product, and Engineering.




WHAT YOU'LL DO

 - Own Customer Solutions end to end. Run pilots, integrations, onboarding, support, and account management.

 - Get customers live and successful. Lead pilots and launches and ensure customers realize value fast.

 - Be the escalation point. Solve complex customer issues when they matter most.

 - Drive retention and expansion. Prove value, grow usage, and increase Verisoul’s footprint.

 - Turn customer pain into product changes. Feed real world learnings directly into the roadmap.

 - Scale with automation. Improve integrations and operations using automation and AI.




WHAT YOU’LL BRING

 - 6 to 10 plus years experience in solutions engineering, technical customer success, product, or similar roles.

 - Strong technical fluency with APIs, integrations, and data driven systems.

 - Clear customer communication in high stakes, technical environments.

 - Startup ownership. You move fast, operate in ambiguity, and own outcomes.

 - Commercial instincts. You understand how customer success drives revenue.

 - Low ego, high ownership. You fix problems and build systems so they do not repeat.




THIS ROLE IS NOT FOR YOU IF:

 - You prefer managing mature teams over building process and outcomes from scratch

 - You need clear processes and playbooks before acting




WHO YOU’LL WORK WITH:

 - Report directly to the CEO

 - Our engineering and product teams, helping turn customer insights into product improvements

 - Our Sales team, helping transition customers post-sales




COMPENSATION: $200-300K + 0.25-0.5% EQUITY

 - Base Salary: $160,000 - 200,000 fixed annual salary

 - Variable Bonus: Target $30,000-80,000

 - 401k match: 4% match of compensation (~$8,000)

 - Equity Grant: 0.25-0.5% with 4-year vesting




LIFE AT VERISOUL



In office 5 days a week in Austin, Texas!




BENEFITS

 - Free Lunch - personalized your way

 - $10K Relocation Bonus

 - 100% Insurance Coverage

 - 4% 401K Match

 - Unlimited Vacation

 - Up to 20 days Remote Annually

 - Beautiful Office




OUR VALUES

 1. All-in Optimism: Building a startup is hard. We bring the energy and steadfast optimism needed to push through challenges and accomplish the impossible—while having fun.

 2. Total Ownership: Be a self-starter and a self-completer. Own high-impact problems end-to-end, combining structure with the execution skills to get the job done.

 3. First Principles Curiosity: Challenge assumptions with a beginner’s mind. Rethink the "current way," test new hypotheses, and focus on finding the truth—even if it means changing your mind.

source_jobs.title: Intelligence Engineer - Offline
source_jobs.description:
ABOUT VERISOUL

Verisoul stops fake accounts and fraud in the era of AI. We distinguish real humans from bots and bad actors for high-growth companies like Clay, Augment Code, and Morning Consult.




OUR TRAJECTORY (LAST 12 MONTHS):

 - 6x YoY Growth: 6x ARR growth (to $2M) and scaled to 100+ customers.

 - Product Dominance: 80% competitive win rate; we catch 70-105% more fraud than legacy tools.

 - Strong Backing: Raised $8.8M Series A






YOU AND YOUR ROLE



Build the deep memory of the system. Analyze history, reputation, and patterns to catch sophisticated fraud that real-time checks miss.




WHAT YOU’LL DO:

 - Architect Reputation Systems: Build batch and nearline pipelines to score risk across identity attributes (email, phone, ISP) and lay the foundation for a scalable intelligence knowledge graph.

 - Deploy Graph Analytics: Use network science—including centrality, community detection, and embeddings—to detect synthetic accounts and visualize complex fraud clusters.

 - Develop Probabilistic Models: Engineer scoring algorithms that integrate historical reputation data and quantify uncertainty for dynamic entities like residential IPs.

 - Innovate & Mine Data: Conduct open-ended discovery on terabytes of historical data to invent new features and uncover evolving patterns in fraud network organization.




WHAT YOU’LL BRING:

 - Experience: 4+ years as a full-stack engineer

 - Big Data Engineering: Experience with batch processing, data pipelines, and warehousing.

 - Entity Resolution: Understanding of how to link data points (email, IP, device) into a cohesive identity.

 - Mathematical Intuition: You understand probability, entropy, or graph theory and can apply them to messy real-world data.

 - Location: In-person in Austin, TX.




WHO YOU’LL WORK WITH:

 - Engineering Team: To define the logic behind risk scores.

 - Platform Team: To make intelligence accessible via APIs.




COMPENSATION: $200,000 - $250,000 + EQUITY GRANT

 - Base Salary: $190,000 - $240,000 fixed annual salary (All Base)

 - 401k match: 4% match of compensation (~$8,000)

 - Equity Grant: 0.2% - 0.4% with 4-year vesting




LIFE AT VERISOUL



In office 5 days a week in Austin, Texas!




BENEFITS

 - Free Lunch - personalized your way

 - $10K Relocation Bonus

 - 100% Insurance Coverage

 - 4% 401K Match

 - Unlimited Vacation

 - Up to 20 days Remote Annually

 - Beautiful Office




OUR VALUES

 1. All-in Optimism: Building a startup is hard. We bring the energy and steadfast optimism needed to push through challenges and accomplish the impossible—while having fun.

 2. Total Ownership: Be a self-starter and a self-completer. Own high-impact problems end-to-end, combining structure with the execution skills to get the job done.

 3. First Principles Curiosity: Challenge assumptions with a beginner’s mind. Rethink the "current way," test new hypotheses, and focus on finding the truth—even if it means changing your mind.

source_jobs.title: Intelligence Engineer - Real-time
source_jobs.description:
ABOUT VERISOUL

Verisoul stops fake accounts and fraud in the era of AI. We distinguish real humans from bots and bad actors for high-growth companies like Clay, Augment Code, and Morning Consult.




OUR TRAJECTORY (LAST 12 MONTHS):

 - 6x YoY Growth: 6x ARR growth (to $2M) and scaled to 100+ customers.

 - Product Dominance: 80% competitive win rate; we catch 70-105% more fraud than legacy tools.

 - Strong Backing: Raised $8.8M Series A






YOU AND YOUR ROLE

Detect fraud, fake accounts, bots, and user clusters in milliseconds using real-time signals and ML modeling. Own the streaming architecture and real-time logic that separates real users from bots instantly.




WHAT YOU’LL DO:

 - Signal Innovation: Create, test, and deploy real-time signal collection and modeling architecture to separate good and bad users. R&D device, network and behavioral features

 - Signal Infra: Develop infrastructure for large scale pipelines that still allow fast iteration

 - Adversarial Modeling: Assume the attacker knows your rules. Build ML models and heuristic logic that adapt to shifting attack vectors.

 - Optimize Latency: Shave milliseconds off event pipelines for instant scoring.

 - Integrate Feedback: Connect intelligence to platform APIs for immediate customer loops.




WHAT YOU’LL BRING:

 - Experience: 4+ years as an engineer, data scientist, ML engineer, or similar

 - Scale: Experience handling high-volume data ingestion in production.

 - End to End ML Modeling: Built large scale models from the ground up with data collection, feature engineering, modeling and monitoring

 - Curiosity & Creativity: You look at a raw stream of events and see a story. You enjoy the "cat and mouse" game of digital forensics.

 - First-Principles Thinking: You look beyond existing solutions and raw data, diving deep into the underlying meaning and ground truth.

 - Location: In-person in Austin, TX.




WHO YOU’LL WORK WITH:

 - Platform Engineering Team: To embed intelligence into the core product suite and real-time SDKs for data collection




TECH STACK:

GKE, GCP, Spanner, Starrocks, Redis, Go, Python, Typescript




COMPENSATION: $200,000 - $250,000 + EQUITY

 - Base Salary: $190,000 - $240,000 fixed annual salary (All Base)

 - 401k match: 4% match of compensation (~$8,000)

 - Equity Grant: 0.25% - 0.5% with 4-year vesting

 - Relocation Bonus: $10K




LIFE AT VERISOUL



In office 5 days a week in Austin, Texas!




BENEFITS

 - Free Lunch - personalized your way

 - $10K Relocation Bonus

 - 100% Insurance Coverage

 - 4% 401K Match

 - Unlimited Vacation

 - Up to 20 days Remote Annually

 - Beautiful Office




OUR VALUES

 1. All-in Optimism: Building a startup is hard. We bring the energy and steadfast optimism needed to push through challenges and accomplish the impossible—while having fun.

 2. Total Ownership: Be a self-starter and a self-completer. Own high-impact problems end-to-end, combining structure with the execution skills to get the job done.

 3. First Principles Curiosity: Challenge assumptions with a beginner’s mind. Rethink the "current way," test new hypotheses, and focus on finding the truth—even if it means changing your mind.

source_jobs.title: Head of Content and Brand
source_jobs.description:
ABOUT VERISOUL

Verisoul stops fake accounts and fraud in the era of AI. We distinguish real humans from bots and bad actors for high-growth companies like Clay, Augment Code, and Morning Consult.




OUR TRAJECTORY (LAST 12 MONTHS):

 - 6x YoY Growth: 6x ARR growth (to $2M) and scaled to 100+ customers.

 - Product Dominance: 80% competitive win rate; we catch 70-105% more fraud than legacy tools.

 - Strong Backing: Raised $8.8M Series A






YOU AND YOUR ROLE



As Head of Content and Brand, you own the voice, narrative, and public presence of Verisoul. You shape how the market understands our company, our product, and our leadership.

This is not a role focused on SEO churn or generic blog production. You define and execute Verisoul’s brand identity, founder voice, and storytelling strategy across channels.

You'll be a senior individual contributor with high leverage and ownership.




WHAT YOU’LL DO:

 1. Own the Verisoul story. Define our voice and positioning across all content.

 2. Lead founder content. Manage the public presence of Verisoul’s founders and leadership.

 3. Explain complex products clearly. Write technical blogs, white papers, launches, and announcements.

 4. Create differentiation. Find new channels and narratives that make Verisoul stand out.

 5. Enable sales. Produce high impact decks, one pagers, and narrative assets for enterprise deals.

 6. Drive launches and adoption. Lead content for product launches and ongoing customer adoption.


WHAT YOU’LL BRING:

 - 6+ years experience in content, brand, or narrative driven marketing.

 - Proven audience growth. You have built and grown an audience from zero.

 - Technical fluency. You can write about complex products with clarity.

 - Exceptional writing judgment. You can shift between founder voice, technical depth, and sales content.

 - Strong audience empathy. You understand who you are speaking to and why they care.




WHO YOU’LL WORK WITH:

 - Report to the Chief Strategy Officer

 - Work closely with the Founders to manage their public profiles and extract insights

 - Collaborate with sales and product to turn unique features into high quality selling decks




COMPENSATION: $140-200K + EQUITY

 - Base Salary: $120,000-160,000

 - Variable Bonus: $15,000-30,000

 - 401K Match: 4% of compensation

 - Equity Grant: 0.05-0.2% with 4-year vesting




LIFE AT VERISOUL



In office 5 days a week in Austin, Texas!




BENEFITS

 - Free Lunch - personalized your way

 - $10K Relocation Bonus

 - 100% Insurance Coverage

 - 4% 401K Match

 - Unlimited Vacation

 - Up to 20 days Remote Annually

 - Beautiful Office




OUR VALUES

 1. All-in Optimism: Building a startup is hard. We bring the energy and steadfast optimism needed to push through challenges and accomplish the impossible—while having fun.

 2. Total Ownership: Be a self-starter and a self-completer. Own high-impact problems end-to-end, combining structure with the execution skills to get the job done.

 3. First Principles Curiosity: Challenge assumptions with a beginner’s mind. Rethink the "current way," test new hypotheses, and focus on finding the truth—even if it means changing your mind.

notes: High-growth company with strong product focus and AI-driven solutions.
